title: portulaca foliosa
intro: Portulaca foliosa, also known as the leafy purslane or purslane-leaved portulaca, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It is a succulent plant with edible and medicinal properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, and has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and digestive issues. Portulaca foliosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, and is also consumed raw in salads or as a garnish.
